name: majiang
description: HTML5 + JavaScript で動作する麻雀アプリ「電脳麻将」

scripts.build:res: mkdir -p dist/resources/头像 dist/resources/music dist/resources/voice dist/img && cp resources/头像/*.png dist/resources/头像/ && cp resources/music/*.mp3 dist/resources/music/ && cp -r resources/voice/* dist/resources/voice/ && cp -r resources/img/* dist/img/
scripts.build: npm run build:html && npm run build:css && npm run build:js && npm run build:res
scripts.release: npm run build:html && npm run build:css && webpack --mode production

author: Satoshi Kobayashi (https://github.com/kobalab)
